channel.title: Google Ad Manager: How to use responsive ads and open ads in a new tab
channel.description:
Congratz! :partying_face: Thank you very much for providing this package. I've tested it and it works fine. However, i have two questions:
1. How can i use responsive ads? something like mapping, as described here: https://developers.google.com/doubleclick-gpt/guides/ad-sizes#responsive_ads 2. How can i use the props to open the ads in a new tab?
Thank you very much. Best, Dejan

item.title: Google Ad Manager: How to use responsive ads and open ads in a new tab
item.dc:creator: dejangeorgiev
item.description:
Hi @mburridge

Thank you very much for your feedback, this helps a lot. Appreciate it!

Best,
Dejan

Read full topic
item.source: Google Ad Manager: How to use responsive ads and open ads in a new tab

item.title: Google Ad Manager: How to use responsive ads and open ads in a new tab
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @dejangeorgiev

  1. The package does not support responsive ads in that way at the moment.
  2. To open an ad in a new tab it looks like it’s something you need to configure in the Ad Manager settings. Please see:
  • https://support.google.com/admanager/thread/21423221
  • https://stackoverflow.com/questions/29207293/how-to-open-google-ad-on-new-tab

Hope this helps.

Read full topic
item.source: Google Ad Manager: How to use responsive ads and open ads in a new tab

item.title: Google Ad Manager: How to use responsive ads and open ads in a new tab
item.dc:creator: dejangeorgiev
item.description:
Congratz!
Thank you very much for providing this package. I’ve tested it and it works fine.
However, i have two questions:

  1. How can i use responsive ads? something like mapping, as described here: https://developers.google.com/doubleclick-gpt/guides/ad-sizes#responsive_ads
  2. How can i use the props to open the ads in a new tab?

Thank you very much.
Best,
Dejan

Read full topic
